description_long: This object is a modern built-in electric oven, featuring a sleek black glass front with a large transparent door and a stainless steel handle. The control panel is situated above the door and includes several digital displays, touch-sensitive buttons, and indicator lights, all arranged in a horizontal row. The oven cavity is spacious, with visible metal racks and grooves for adjustable shelving. The sides and back are plain, boxy, and metallic, designed for integration into cabinetry. The brand name 'WESTERFELD' is prominently displayed on the lower front panel. The overall design is minimalist and contemporary, suitable for urban kitchens.
description: A modern built-in electric oven with a black glass front, digital control panel, and a large transparent door. The design is sleek and minimalist, with a visible brand logo and spacious interior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black glass door, digital control panel, and brand logo.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the plain, boxy metallic side and the thin profile of the control panel.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the solid metallic back and the top edge of the control panel.
description_view_3: Right side view with a similar plain metallic surface and the control panel's edge.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is a horizontal strip above the oven door, featuring three digital displays spaced evenly across the width. Touch-sensitive buttons are arranged in groups below each display, with icons and labels for functions such as timer, temperature, and settings. Indicator lights are integrated within the panel.
